powers.label: Check Versions
powers.prompt: Check current versions of all platform components: steer-runtime (from ~/.kiro/steer-runtime/VERSION), Koda (koda version), Kite (from ~/.koda/bin/kite/Kite.app/Contents/Resources/app/package.json). Also check latest published releases on github.com/rsanchez-disney for each. Report which are up to date and which need publishing.

powers.label: Publish All
powers.prompt: Run the full publish pipeline: cd ~/Workspace/Disney/SANCR225/Koda && make publish-all. Report the results.

powers.label: Generate Release Notes
powers.prompt: Review commits since the last tag in steer-runtime and Koda. Generate RELEASE_NOTES.md entries following the existing format. Show me the draft before writing.

powers.label: Update Changelogs
powers.prompt: Update CHANGELOG.md in steer-runtime and Koda with entries from commits since the last release. Follow conventional commit format grouping (feat, fix, docs, chore).

powers.label: List All PRs
powers.prompt: List all open PRs across steer platform repos on github.disney.com/SANCR225: steer-runtime, Koda, Kite, mouseketool. Show title, author, age, and review status for each.

powers.label: Review Oldest
powers.prompt: Find the oldest open PR across steer-runtime, Koda, and Kite repos. Review it: check the diff, assess quality, identify issues, and provide a review summary.

powers.label: Roadmap Status
powers.prompt: Read ~/Workspace/Disney/SANCR225/steer-runtime/docs/ROADMAP.md and summarize: what's completed, what's in progress, and what's planned next. Highlight any items that are overdue.

powers.label: Specs Status
powers.prompt: List all spec documents in ~/Workspace/Disney/SANCR225/steer-runtime/docs/specs/. For each, determine if it's been implemented (check for related commits/PRs) or still pending.

powers.label: Update Roadmap
powers.prompt: Based on recent commits and completed work across steer-runtime and Koda, suggest updates to the ROADMAP.md. Show me the proposed changes before writing.

powers.label: Run Doctor
powers.prompt: Run koda doctor and report the full results. Highlight any failures or warnings that need attention.

powers.label: Audit Agents
powers.prompt: Audit all installed agents. Count per profile, check for missing prompts, validate JSON schemas, identify any agents without descriptions.

powers.label: MCP Health
powers.prompt: Check all MCP servers: which are configured, which have missing tokens, which failed to start. Report status for each.

powers.label: Deploy Docs
powers.prompt: Run: cd ~/Workspace/Disney/SANCR225/steer-runtime && make docs-deploy. Report the result.

powers.label: Validate Configs
powers.prompt: Validate all steer-runtime configurations: workspace.json files, agent configs, profile settings, mcp-meta.json files. Report any errors or inconsistencies.

powers.label: Check Fork Sync
powers.prompt: Check if any team forks of steer-runtime are behind main. List repos that need to pull latest changes.

powers.label: Cleanup Old Releases
powers.prompt: Check github.com/rsanchez-disney repos for old releases (keeping last 3). List what would be cleaned up.
